title: CC narrative review S16 panel a1

payload.notes:
S16 fully delivers beat B09 (Honest Re-run · ACCEPT). All expected literals present and correct: ACCEPT, 0.78, 0.89; header 'HONEST RE-RUN — RAW SCORING'; verdict card carries the trust chain (2048 samples · raw, sanitizer: BYPASSED, json.loads ✓ clean), so the green stamp reads as earned by the raw pipeline rather than asserted. NARRATIVE-ONLY judgment of panels/S16_panel_a01.png.

BEAT FIDELITY 5/5 — This is the payoff of the whole honesty arc (S12 inflated +6.2 → S13 sanitizer cheat exposed → S14 collapse to +1.4 → S15 WARN_corrected verdict → S16 raw re-run earns ACCEPT). The reviewer stamping the green ACCEPT in the mirrored pose of his earlier red REJECT slam closes the visual rhyme the arc set up, and the executor's tempered micro-bounce sells 'proud but earned' instead of triumphalism. The rising exact_parse strip with both endpoints called out (0.78 → 0.89) plus 'sanitizer: BYPASSED / json.loads ✓ clean' makes the causal story explicit: same metric, no self-repair, and it still holds — exactly what B09 needs. The DDL T-02:58 chip keeps the deadline-pressure thread alive into the closing beats.

COMPOSITION (STORY) 4.5/5 — Reading order flows header → rising exact_parse strip → REVIEW · RE-RUN verdict card → green ACCEPT stamp cleanly, and the panel stays clearly distinct from S14 (collapse) and S15 (verdict) while reusing the same war-room now exhaling from red diffs to green parse logs. Docked half a point: the panel is information-dense (strip endpoints, verdict card, trust-chain microcopy, wandb/exact_parse label, DDL chip all compete), so the eye has to work slightly before landing on the ACCEPT stamp as the payoff; a touch more hierarchy around the stamp would make it instant. Visual identity-lock / artifact severity / baked-text legibility / content-corruption are NOT my call — left to the visual reviewers (Gemini/Codex).
